description: The user successfully initiates screen sharing, causing the UI to update from instructions to a 'Perfect!' confirmation message.
frame_description: A dark screen with white text instructions transitioning to a success message.

description: The cursor rests near the browser's screen sharing notification bar at the bottom of the screen.
Task instructions are progressively revealed to the user on the screen.
frame_description: Text instructions appearing line by line on a dark background.

description: The browser navigates from a blank page to the Figma prototype URL.
frame_description: The address bar updates from about:blank to the Figma site URL.

description: The Figma prototype 'Smart Filters' page content begins to load and become visible.
frame_description: The Figma prototype interface appears on the screen.
